P. Mittal (Retired) as Member of the Competition Commission of India from the date of his assumption of charge of the post for a period of five years or till he attains the age of sixty-five years or until further orders, whichever is the earliest. [F. No. 5/22/2014-CS] MANOJ KUMAR, Jt.
